rationale: The four-bead plan is gate-forward and independently implementable. All work_chunks have depends_on: [], and the current ownership globs show Beads 2-4 touch only already-owned workflow/context-system paths; only Bead 1 needs the new internal/trace/** and .golangci.yml claims, and it lands those claims in the same diff as the trace/golangci edits. Bead 2 correctly includes both workflow and context-system doc targets in one bead diff because it changes approve/validate plus contextpack source. Beads 1, 3, and 4 each include a workflow doc target. The 108 doc targets are bead-unique: workflow architecture, workflow overview plus context-system architecture, workflow interfaces, workflow runbook. Chain depth is 0 and each bead is sized for one commit with focused tests. The disclosed post-approval spec edit is mechanical formatting only. Plan validation exits 0 with only the expected R=0.10 redundancy advisory.
